    JavaDeclaration.getVisibilityModifier()
    Returns a Public, Protected, or Private Modifier, if there is one, null otherwise.

    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.translation that return VisibilityModifier
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    VisibilityModifier
    SLResolverManager.getSpecVisibility(MemberDeclaration md)
    Returns a specification-language based visibility level for the passed member that should take precedence over Java's ordinary visibility, or null.
